# betteruptime_role (Data Source)

Look up a team role by name to obtain its ID (for use with `betteruptime_team_member` or the change-role API).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a custom role by name - system role names like member or team_lead work too
data "betteruptime_role" "existing" {
  name = "My custom role"
}

output "role_id" {
  value = data.betteruptime_role.existing.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The role to look up: a system role value (responder, member, team_lead, billing_admin, admin) or a custom role's name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `role` (String) The role identifier: a system role (admin, billing_admin, team_lead, responder, member) or 'custom' for a custom role.
